choice: lib/forecast.ts adapts persisted state -> engine EngineInput: starting balances aggregate per bucket from each asset's LATEST snapshot (falling back to a manual asset's manualValue), nonDrawableGrowth is the value-weighted average growthRate of non-drawable assets, streams/contributions map from rows (with optional per-scenario overrides), startYear = current calendar year. The run action (runForecastAction) computes inputHash = sha256(JSON(engineInput)), derives a numeric seed from its first 8 hex chars, runs 10k trials, and INSERTS a frozen forecasts row (bands, successCurve, seed, inputHash, startingInputs incl. successProbability + startingBalances). Multiple Forecasts per scenario coexist (no upsert). Active Plan: setActivePlan runs a transaction that clears is_plan across the household then sets the one, backed by the partial unique index one_active_plan_per_household. ForecastBand/SuccessPoint schema jsonb types mirror the engine output exactly (incl. age).
rationale: [build-originated] 2949f831 defined Scenario->Forecast->Plan conceptually but not the I/O adapter, the snapshot-vs-manualValue starting-balance rule, the deterministic seed-from-input-hash freezing, or the transactional single-Plan switch. A future builder running or re-forecasting needs these.
